FAQ

Questions We Get Asked.

Still have a question? Chat with us directly on WhatsApp for immediate answers.

Ask on WhatsApp
How long does a typical repair take?+
Most software repairs are completed same day. Hardware repairs like screen replacements and motherboard fixes are usually done within 24 to 48 hours depending on parts availability.
Do you offer warranties on repairs?+
Yes, we offer a service warranty on all repairs. The warranty period depends on the type of repair. We will communicate this clearly when you bring in your device.
Can I get a laptop for NYSC or school use?+
Absolutely. We stock a range of laptops suitable for students, corps members, and professionals at different price points. Chat us on WhatsApp and we will help you pick the right one for your needs and budget.
How much does a business website cost?+
Our website packages start from a basic business site to custom web applications. Pricing depends on your requirements. Chat us on WhatsApp with your business type and we will share a detailed quote quickly.
Do you do remote repairs or support?+
Yes. For software issues, we offer remote support via tools like AnyDesk and TeamViewer. We can connect to your device and fix many issues without you needing to leave your location.
How do I track my device under repair?+
You can check your device status on our Device Tracking page or simply send us a WhatsApp message with your name and the issue you brought in. We will give you an instant update.

Our Mission

Make quality tech services accessible and affordable for every individual and business in the South East.

Our Vision

Become the most trusted technology solutions brand in Imo State and beyond.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and reliable service delivery every time.

Excellence

Premium output at every touchpoint, from the first WhatsApp reply to final delivery.

Who We Are

Mimisco Technologies & Resources

Mimisco Technologies & Resources was founded in Owerri in 2017 with one clear mission: give individuals and businesses in the South East access to reliable, affordable technology and the skills to use it well.

Over eight years, we have served over 1,000 customers, repaired hundreds of devices, sold quality hardware, designed websites, and trained more than seven technicians who are now active in the local tech economy.

"We are not just selling laptops or fixing screens. We are building the infrastructure for a tech-literate South East, one repair, one website, one trained technician at a time."

Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission under the Companies and Allied Matters Act 2020, Mimisco Technologies is a fully legal, locally-owned technology business based on FUTO Road, Owerri, Imo State.

Our services cover the full spectrum of technology needs: hardware sales, repairs and maintenance, IT support, website development, digital training, and spare parts supply. You do not need multiple vendors. We handle it all.

Repair Booking

Book a Repair.
Fast. Reliable. Trusted.

Fill the form below and we will contact you immediately via WhatsApp to confirm your appointment.

How it Works

Simple 3-Step Process

1

Fill the Form

Enter your device details, issue, and preferred appointment time.

2

WhatsApp Confirmation

Your form details open directly in WhatsApp. We confirm within minutes.

3

Repair & Collection

Drop off your device or arrange pickup. We fix it fast and notify you when done.

Most repairs completed in 24h. Hardware repairs may take 24-48 hours depending on parts. You will be kept updated via WhatsApp throughout.

Repair Booking Form

Your booking details will be sent directly to our WhatsApp. We respond within minutes.
